message:
fix(migration): correct off-by-one threshold comparisons and remove dead event-drain blocks

bpet_migration_gate.rs + dgis_migration_gate.rs:
- Changed all gate threshold comparisons from >= to > so that values
  exactly at the threshold are admitted rather than escalated. The
  previous >= semantics caused borderline-safe migrations to be
  unnecessarily blocked or sent to the evidence-required path when the
  metric landed precisely on the configured limit.
- Removed redundant MAX_EVENTS drain blocks that could never trigger:
  the event vectors grow by exactly one push at a time starting well
  within the MAX_EVENTS bound, so the overflow check was dead code
  that added noise to every gate evaluation path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
